Text.Page:
Here, take these kits. Craft some metalworker's hauberks and bring them to me when you're finished.

If they pass inspection, I know just where to send them.

Nice, very nice. This is fine work, .

I'd say this is ready for the field. Deliver the hauberks to Jodoc in Crescentia. He needs all the armor he can get.
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.
Fine suits of armor you've brought us. Excellent work. Thank you!
